# SetuLix by SetuLabsAI
> AI-powered tools platform for Indian businesses, creators, and professionals.

SetuLix offers 27 tools across 5 professional kits. Free tools (zero credits)
and AI-powered paid tools (credit-based). No subscription needed to start.

Website: https://setulix.com
Founder: Deepak Rathor
Company: SetuLabsAI
Contact: talk.enterprise@setulix.com
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/deepakgrathor/

## Plans
- Free: ₹0 — 10 welcome credits, free tools unlimited
- Lite: ₹399/month — 200 credits/month
- Pro: ₹999/month — 700 credits/month
- Business: ₹2999/month — 1500 credits/month, team seats

## Tool Kits

### Creator Kit — /kits/creator
Tools for Indian content creators and YouTubers.
- Blog Generator (/tools/blog-generator) — AI blog post writer for Indian audiences
- YouTube Script Writer (/tools/yt-script) — full YT video scripts
- Thumbnail AI (/tools/thumbnail-ai) — AI-generated YouTube thumbnails
- Title Generator (/tools/title-generator) — YouTube and blog title ideas
- Hook Writer (/tools/hook-writer) — attention-grabbing content hooks
- Caption Generator (/tools/caption-generator) — Instagram and social captions

### SME Kit — /kits/sme
Free business document tools for Indian small businesses.
- GST Invoice Generator (/tools/gst-invoice) — GST-compliant invoices, zero credits
- Expense Tracker (/tools/expense-tracker) — business expense tracking, zero credits
- Quotation Generator (/tools/quotation-generator) — professional quotes, zero credits
- Salary Slip Generator (/tools/salary-slip) — payslips for employees, zero credits
- Offer Letter Generator (/tools/offer-letter) — employment offer letters, zero credits
- TDS Sheet (/tools/tds-sheet) — TDS calculation sheet, zero credits
- QR Code Generator (/tools/qr-generator) — business QR codes, zero credits

### HR Kit — /kits/hr
AI tools for Indian HR professionals and teams.
- Job Description Generator (/tools/jd-generator) — AI-written job descriptions
- Resume Screener (/tools/resume-screener) — AI resume shortlisting
- Appraisal Draft (/tools/appraisal-draft) — performance appraisal writing
- Policy Generator (/tools/policy-generator) — HR policy documents

### Legal Kit — /kits/legal
AI legal drafting tools for Indian businesses and CA professionals.
- Legal Notice Generator (/tools/legal-notice) — legally worded notices
- NDA Generator (/tools/nda-generator) — non-disclosure agreements
- Legal Disclaimer (/tools/legal-disclaimer) — website and app disclaimers
- GST Calculator (/tools/gst-calculator) — GST calculation, zero credits
- WhatsApp Bulk Message (/tools/whatsapp-bulk) — bulk message composer

### Marketing Kit — /kits/marketing
AI marketing tools for Indian brands and agencies.
- Ad Copy Writer (/tools/ad-copy) — Facebook and Google ad copy
- Email Subject Line Generator (/tools/email-subject) — high open-rate subjects
- LinkedIn Bio Generator (/tools/linkedin-bio) — professional LinkedIn summaries
- SEO Auditor (/tools/seo-auditor) — website SEO analysis

### Website Kit — /kits/website
AI website content generation for Indian businesses.
- Website Generator (/tools/website-generator) — full website content generation

## Target Audience
Indian freelancers, small and medium businesses (SMEs), HR professionals,
CA and legal professionals, digital marketers, content creators, YouTubers,
startups, agencies operating in India.

## Technology
Built on Next.js 14, powered by Claude (Anthropic), GPT-4o (OpenAI),
and Gemini (Google). Payments via UPI (Paygic) and Cashfree.
Hosted on Vercel.
